activities_projects.title: Exploring Objects with a Magnifying Glass
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how magnification reveals hidden details in everyday objects
steps: Observe a small object like a leaf or chalk using a magnifying glass
Identify the patterns or textures visible through magnification
Compare the appearance with normal observation
Record your findings in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop observation and analytical skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of observations and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding Visual Imagery in Poetry
activities_projects.objective: Interpret imagery used in the poem
steps: Read the poem 'Magnifying Glass' carefully
Identify lines where the poet describes small objects in detail
Explain how the imagery helps readers visualize the scene
Write your explanation in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how imagery enhances poetic meaning

activities_projects.title: Poem Summary Activity
steps: Read the poem attentively
Identify the central idea of the poem
Write a summary explaining how the magnifying glass reveals wonders in nature
Share your summary with the teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve comprehension and writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and accuracy of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Poetic Devices Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognize literary devices used in the poem
steps: Re-read the poem carefully
Identify examples of simile, metaphor, and personification
Write the lines containing these devices
Explain how each device enhances the poem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of literary devices in poetry

activities_projects.title: Creative Illustration of Magnified Objects
activities_projects.objective: Visualize and represent magnified details creatively
steps: Choose a small object like moss, chalk, or a drop of water
Draw the object as seen normally
Draw how it might appear when magnified
Label the newly visible details
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand magnification through visual representation
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity of drawing (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary and Meaning Activity
steps: Identify unfamiliar words from the poem
Find their meanings using a dictionary
Write the meanings in your notebook
Use each word in a meaningful sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and contextual understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Scientific Tools Discussion
steps: Discuss different magnifying tools such as microscopes and telescopes
Explain how each tool helps in scientific observation
Write examples of fields where these tools are used
Present your ideas in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect poetry with scientific observation
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of explanation and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Collective Nouns Practice
activities_projects.objective: Strengthen grammar knowledge of collective nouns
steps: Read the list of collective nouns in the exercise
Match phrases such as 'a swarm of' with the correct noun
Write the correct combinations in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn correct usage of collective nouns

activities_projects.title: Idioms with 'Eye' Exercise
activities_projects.objective: Learn idiomatic expressions related to observation
steps: Read idioms related to the word 'eye'
Match them with their meanings
Write example sentences using each idiom
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand figurative language in English

activities_projects.title: Creative Writing: A World Through a Lens
steps: Imagine you have a powerful magnifying lens
Describe what you would observe in nature
Explain how magnification changes your perception
Write a short paragraph describing the experience
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop imagination and descriptive writing skills
